name: 05-13-chat-input-game-panel-relocation
title: Move mini-game panel out of chat input flow
description: Relocate the tabletop mini-game launcher so it no longer sits between chat messages and the composer/input area, and keep @ mention suggestions hidden until @ is typed.
creator: lijin
notes: Moved the large tabletop mini-game launcher out of the chat input flow. Native workbench keeps composer directly after chat status and folds mini-games into secondary tools after the composer; legacy chat room places mini-games in a collapsed drawer after ChatInputArea. Follow-up review simplified script coverage: kept only lightweight source-order checks and removed brittle copy-level / implementation-detail assertions for the @ mention copy/menu.
